report.summary: Added missing Breadcrumb navigation to Verkle Trees guide, improved FaqAccordion accessibility with ARIA attributes and focus/hover states, created 5 OG images for high-priority published tool pages.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added missing Breadcrumb component to ethereum-verkle-trees-hegota-guide-2026 page (was the only recently touched learn page without navigation breadcrumbs)
Enhanced FaqAccordion (solana-token-extensions-guide-2026) with aria-expanded, aria-controls, role attributes for screen reader accessibility
Added keyboard focus styles (2px #6366f1 outline) to FaqAccordion buttons for WCAG compliance
Added hover background state to FaqAccordion buttons for better interaction feedback
Added flexShrink: 0 to FAQ chevron icon to prevent layout compression on long questions
Added top margin to FAQ answer text for better visual spacing after border
Identified 85 tool pages missing OG images — prioritized 5 published tools for this cycle

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: tax-calculator (1200x630) — calculator mockup with gain/tax display, brand gradient accent bar
OG image: wallet-analyzer (1200x630) — pie chart portfolio breakdown with ETH/BTC/SOL allocation
OG image: crypto-watchlist (1200x630) — token list rows with live prices and percent changes
OG image: degen-score (1200x630) — circular score gauge with DeFi/NFT/Trade breakdown bars
OG image: dao-treasury-dashboard (1200x630) — bar chart of top DAO treasuries with total value

sections.title: Code Changes
items: src/app/learn/ethereum-verkle-trees-hegota-guide-2026/page.tsx — added Breadcrumb import and rendering
src/app/learn/solana-token-extensions-guide-2026/FaqAccordion.tsx — rewrote with accessibility, useCallback, hover/focus states
public/og-tax-calculator.svg — new OG image
public/og-wallet-analyzer.svg — new OG image
public/og-crypto-watchlist.svg — new OG image
public/og-degen-score.svg — new OG image
public/og-dao-treasury-dashboard.svg — new OG image

sections.title: Remaining Work
items: 80 tool pages still need OG images (non-published or lower priority — batch in future cycles)
Consider extracting FaqAccordion into shared /components/ for reuse across all learn pages
Verkle Trees page uses hardcoded degen0x.com URL in OG metadata instead of SITE_URL constant
